hero_sub: I build custom websites for small businesses — fast, good-looking, and designed to actually bring in customers. No templates. No handoffs. Just one person who cares about your business.
services_intro: Whether you're starting from scratch or replacing something that isn't working — I handle design, development, SEO, and support. All of it, one person, no agency markup.
svc1_desc: Built around your business, not a template someone else already used. Every layout, color, and detail chosen with intention.
svc2_desc: Built with SvelteKit and TypeScript — loads fast, ranks well, and won't break. The kind of code that holds up three years from now.
svc3_desc: Connect your site to whatever scheduling tool you use. Make it easy for customers to book — and hard for them to leave without doing so.
svc4_desc: Show up when people nearby search for what you do. Google Business optimization, structured data, and the technical stuff that actually moves the needle.
svc5_desc: The details that make your site feel premium — scroll animations, smooth transitions, and interactions that make visitors stop and look.
svc6_desc: Need to update a page, add a feature, or fix something? I'm available after launch. No support tickets. Just message me.
band_quote: A good website doesn't just look nice —
band_quote_end: for the person looking at it.
process_sub: I've kept it straightforward on purpose. You'll always know where things stand and what's coming next.
step1_body: Before anything gets designed or built, I want to understand your business — what you do, who your customers are, and what you actually need from your website. Usually an hour.
step2_body: I design the full site in Figma first. You can see exactly what you're getting, leave feedback, and request changes — all before a line of code is written.
step3_body: Development with weekly check-ins so you're never left wondering. Fast load times and good SEO are built in from the start, not added as an afterthought.
step4_body: I handle deployment and make sure everything goes live without issues. After that I'm still around — for updates, questions, or whatever comes up next.
t1_quote: Austin built something I didn't know I needed — a website that genuinely feels like walking into my studio. My clients comment on how calming it is before they even arrive.
t2_quote: I had a website before. I had a developer before. Neither felt like a partner. Austin has been the most valuable addition to my practice outside of clinical training.
t3_quote: My bookings went up noticeably in the first few months after launch. I didn't realize how much my old site was quietly turning people away.
about1_body: I'm Austin — a web developer based in Michigan. I started Ironpine because I kept seeing small businesses stuck with websites that looked dated, loaded slowly, and didn't reflect how good their actual business was.
about2_h: You work with me, not an account manager
about2_body: No agencies, no outsourcing, no junior developers. When you hire Ironpine, you get me — for the design conversation, the build, the launch, and the support call six months later.
about3_h: Websites that are worth the investment
about3_body: A website should do something — bring in customers, build trust, make it easy to get in touch. If yours isn't doing that, it's not working hard enough. That's what I'm here to fix.
footer_copy: © 2026 Ironpine Web Studio LLC · All rights reserved.
meta_title: Ironpine Web Studio — Custom Web Design for Small Businesses | Michigan
meta_desc: Michigan-based web designer building custom websites for small businesses. Fast, good-looking, and designed to bring in customers. No templates, no agencies.
work_intro: Every site built from scratch — designed around the specific business and what it needs to accomplish.
contact_intro: Tell me about your business and what you're looking for. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact_success_b: I'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact_error: Something went wrong. Please email me directly.
contact_cal_sub: Prefer to talk it through? Pick a time and we'll figure out if we're a good fit.
